steps.title: Use the rectangle perimeter formula
steps.content: A rectangle has two lengths and two widths. Use $P=2l+2w$, or add the four side lengths directly.

steps.title: Identify the perimeter formula for a rectangle
steps.content: The perimeter of a rectangle is the sum of all four sides. Since opposite sides are equal, we use length and width to calculate it. We're given length = 15 and width = 7.

steps.title: Substitute the values and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $l = 15$ and $w = 7$ into the formula:
$$P = 2(15) + 2(7)$$
$$P = 30 + 14$$
$$P = 44$$
That is the correct answer.
